disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute severe abdominal distension and diffuse colicky pain that began about 6 hours ago after a large pasta meal
trigger_question_examples: When did the pain and bloating start?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: After a big pasta dinner about six hours ago my belly blew up and I've had these awful cramps rolling across my whole tummy ever since.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Has not passed any flatus all evening despite the bloating and pain
trigger_question_examples: Have you been able to pass any wind or open your bowels?
Any change to your bowel habit tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No — that's what's scaring me, I haven't been able to pass any wind at all this evening.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No vomiting, no fever, and pain not localised to the right lower quadrant
trigger_question_examples: Any fever, or has the pain settled into your lower right side?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't been sick, I don't feel feverish, and the pain isn't in one spot — it's all across my belly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Months of intermittent bloating and gripey abdominal pain, previously attributed to IBS and often dismissed
trigger_question_examples: Have you had tummy trouble like this before?
Is this a new problem or something ongoing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had on-and-off bloating and cramps for months and been told it's probably just IBS, but tonight is far worse than usual.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recently had blood tests taken for the ongoing gut symptoms, with results still pending
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any tests done recently?
Is anyone already looking into your gut symptoms?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had some blood tests done recently to look into my gut problems and I'm still waiting on the results.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Distressed and pacing, fearful that this represents a bowel blockage
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling about all this?
What are you most worried it might be?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm really worked up — I can't sit still and I'm frightened this is a blockage.
